## Summary

Describe the user-visible and internal changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm ci` succeeds with the committed lockfile
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested in a disposable Zotero profile
- [ ] Citation updates were tested with network failure/rate limiting
- [ ] Zotero closes cleanly with the plugin enabled
- [ ] No credentials, real `.env`, local Zotero profile, SQLite cache, or private library data are included

## Screenshots or logs

Redact usernames, local paths, API keys, unpublished titles, and private identifiers before attaching logs or screenshots.
